description: A saved Smart View: a per-user or grain-standard tabbed list over leads or activities, with a chosen column set, a condition predicate, and a grain scope. Read-only surface (tatva_connect.smartview.api). Business views ship via db-seeds; only test views are seeded in code.

fields.label: Owner User
fields.description: The user this view belongs to. Blank for a standard (grain-shared) view.

fields.label: Is Standard
fields.description: A grain-standard view shown to every user in the grain (curated, ops-seeded).

fields.label: Is Shared
fields.description: Shared with other users in the grain (vs private to the owner).

fields.label: Base Object
fields.description: Lead = one row per patient (CRM Lead). Activity = one row per activity (CRM Task of activity_type).

fields.label: Activity Type
fields.description: The CRM Task Type driving an Activity view (required when base object is Activity).

fields.label: Predicate (JSON)
fields.description: The condition tree (AND/OR groups of catalog-field conditions). Catalog fields only.

fields.label: Columns (JSON)
fields.description: Ordered catalog field_keys to project (the chosen column set).

name: CRM Smart View
